title: DfE Update: 11 June 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Information 16 to 19 additional funding for academic year 2025 to 2026   Information New entitlement to free school meals for all children in households in receipt of Universal Credit   Information Guidance to support post 16 funding assurance audits   Information Document exchange will be unavailable from 2pm on Thursday 12 June until 9am on Friday 13 June 2025   Information Teacher Mentoring Programme: Promotion of Cohort 6   Information Taking teaching further (TTF) 2025   Reminder Year-end funding claim for 2024 to 2025     Latest information for academies     Article Title     Information 16 to 19 additional funding for academic year 2025 to 2026   Information New entitlement to free school meals for all children in households in receipt of Universal Credit   Information Primary PE and sports premium funding for 2025 to 2026   Information Document exchange will be unavailable from 2pm on Thursday 12 June until 9am on Friday 13 June 2025   Reminder Year-end funding claim for 2024 to 2025   Events and webinars RPA Members only: Mock Trial   Events and webinars Q&A drop-in sessions: Academies chart of accounts and automationl   Events and webinars The Buying for schools’ summer term webinar schedule is open for bookings     Latest information for local authorities     Article Title     Information 16 to 19 additional funding for academic year 2025 to 2026   Information New entitlement to free school meals for all children in households in receipt of Universal Credit   Information Primary PE and sports premium funding for 2025 to 2026   Information Document exchange will be unavailable from 2pm on Thursday 12 June until 9am on Friday 13 June 2025   Reminder Year-end funding claim for 2024 to 2025   Events and webinars RPA Members only: Mock Trial   Events and webinars The Buying for schools’ summer term webinar schedule is open for bookings    "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
School and academy financial management and assurance
